hero.headline: The septic team *Hagerstown trusts*
hero.subheadline: Same-day emergency service. Real answers over the phone. No surprises on the bill.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every septic need handled
services_section.subheading: From routine pumping to emergency repairs

services.title: Septic Pumping
services.description: Regular maintenance pumping to keep your system running smooth. We'll remind you when it's time.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: System backing up? Alarm going off? We'll diagnose the problem and fix it right.

services.title: System Inspections
services.description: Complete system checkups to catch problems before they become expensive headaches.

services.title: Drain Field Service
services.description: Drain field issues diagnosed and repaired by techs who know what they're looking at.

about.heading: Real septic pros
about.body: We're the Hagerstown septic team that shows up when we say we will. One call gets you John — not a call center, not a voicemail.

reviews.name: Rebecca H.
reviews.text: Amazing service, professional and came earlier when I called same morning to change appointment time. Very reasonable pricing. Been using them for years.

reviews.name: J. L.
reviews.text: Emergency septic issue and John got out sooner than expected. Very informative and understanding. Reasonably priced. Couldn't ask for better.

reviews.name: Kelly L.
reviews.text: JR's is my first call for septic needs. John is compassionate and timely getting back to you. Called at 4pm, he called back before 5pm and came right out.

cta.heading: Septic problems don't wait
cta.body: Get honest answers and upfront pricing. Call now or request your free quote online.
